description: A supply chain analyst must ensure that serialization data for a batch of product is correctly commissioned and sent to downstream partners.

nodes.task_description: Receive a file of serialized product identifiers for a newly packaged batch.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully ingests the file of unique serial numbers.

nodes.task_description: Commission the serial numbers in the central repository, associating them with the product code and lot number.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the status of the serial numbers to 'Commissioned'.

nodes.task_description: Generate an EPCIS (Electronic Product Code Information Services) event to record the shipment of the batch to a wholesale distributor.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a valid EPCIS file detailing the shipment.

nodes.task_description: Transmit the EPCIS file to the trading partner.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully sends the file and receives a confirmation of receipt.
